Title: Crimsonberry Tea
Body HTML: Bold colour, bolder flavour. Crimsonberry is a rich, deep berry blend that brews into a stunning crimson cup with a naturally tart-sweet flavour that hits every note right. Caffeine free, vibrant, and the kind of tea that makes you stop and notice it. Hot or cold, it's always impressive.
Metafield: custom.tasting_notes [single_: Rich berry, tart-sweet, deep with a smooth finish
Metafield: custom.best_enjoyed [single_l: Hot or cold over ice any time of day

Title: Herbal Chai
Body HTML: All the warmth of a classic chai, none of the caffeine. Premium rooibos meets traditional chai spices for a blend that's warming, balanced, and made for everyday indulgence. The one you reach for when you want all the comfort without the kick.
Metafield: custom.tasting_notes [single_: Warm, spiced, smooth with a naturally sweet rooibos base
Metafield: custom.best_enjoyed [single_l: Any time of day — on its own or as a latte

Title: Pumpkin Chai Black Tea
Body HTML: Pumpkin spice, but make it actually good. Bold Kenyan black tea meets pumpkin flakes, cinnamon, and orange peel for a rich, warming cup that's cozy without being obvious. Brew it strong, add steamed milk, and thank yourself later.
Metafield: custom.tasting_notes [single_: Warm, spiced, smooth with a hint of citrus
Metafield: custom.best_enjoyed [single_l: Any time of year on its own or as a latte

Title: Tulsi Chai
Body HTML: Chai spices meet Tulsi, Holy Basil, for a blend that's warm, aromatic, and genuinely uplifting. Smooth and comforting with a natural wellness twist that makes every cup feel intentional. Your everyday ritual, elevated.
Metafield: custom.tasting_notes [single_: Warm, spiced, aromatic with a naturally uplifting herbal note
Metafield: custom.best_enjoyed [single_l: Morning or evening on its own or with steamed milk

Title: Ube Matcha Tea
Body HTML: Premium matcha meets sweet ube and a touch of vanilla, the latte upgrade you didn't know you needed. Creamy, colourful, and comforting in every sip. Hot or iced, it's the kind of cup that makes mornings worth waking up for.
Metafield: custom.tasting_notes [single_: Creamy, sweet ube, smooth matcha with a hint of vanilla
Metafield: custom.best_enjoyed [single_l: As a latte, hot or iced

Title: Unflavoured Black Iced Tea
Body HTML: No fuss, no frills, just great black tea over ice. Clean, bold, and refreshing, our unflavoured black iced tea is the one you reach for when you want something straightforward and seriously satisfying. Add lemon, add sugar, add nothing. It works all three ways.
Metafield: custom.tasting_notes [single_: Bold, clean, smooth with a slight tannin finish
Metafield: custom.best_enjoyed [single_l: Cold over ice morning or afternoon
